scripts.check: node --check background.js content.js popup/popup.js shared/api.js shared/sync.js shared/browser-compat.js dashboard/dashboard.js dashboard/sync/supabase.js password-reset/password-reset.js firefox/background.js
scripts.sign:firefox: npm run pack:firefox && npx web-ext sign --source-dir dist/firefox/minutario-firefox --artifacts-dir dist/firefox --api-key %AMO_JWT_ISSUER% --api-secret %AMO_JWT_SECRET%
scripts.release:pilot: npm run test && npm run check && npm run pack:chrome && npm run pack:firefox
scripts.release:pilot:full:patch: npm run version:bump:patch && npm run release:pilot
scripts.release:pilot:full:minor: npm run version:bump:minor && npm run release:pilot
